title: Notification Service Enhancement

summary.overview: This PR introduces multi-channel notification support, enabling delivery via email, SMS, and push notifications through a unified dispatcher. The implementation follows a clean strategy pattern with well-defined channel interfaces and comprehensive test coverage. No issues were identified during the review.

riskAssessment.summary: Changes are well-scoped to the notification dispatch layer with no impact on existing channel implementations. All new code paths are covered by tests.
items: New dispatcher is backward-compatible with existing single-channel consumers
Feature flag controls rollout of multi-channel delivery
Graceful degradation when a channel is unavailable

strengths: Excellent use of the strategy pattern to decouple channel-specific logic from the dispatcher
Comprehensive unit and integration tests covering all delivery paths including failure scenarios
Clear separation of concerns between message formatting and delivery mechanisms
Retry logic with exponential backoff is well-implemented and configurable per channel
Thorough input validation with descriptive error messages for malformed notification payloads
Well-structured logging with correlation IDs for end-to-end delivery tracing

recommendations: Consider adding OpenTelemetry spans around each channel dispatch call to enable distributed tracing in production
Document the channel priority and fallback order in the project README for future contributors
